properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v2 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm moving forward, no more restraints I now walk in freedom and this is the exchange Chaos to peace, pity to praise I know I'm no victim when I'm lifting up Your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Look down, our chains are on the floor Look up, we're not hindered anymore Look around, He's already won the war Look up, look up

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Fear is defeated, no hold on me I live in the power of my Savior's victory

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: So look down, our chains are on the floor Look up, we're not hindered anymore Look around, He's already won the war Look up, look up. :/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Freedom is contagious Come and join us in His praise Bless the name of Jesus It's for freedom we are saved. x4
